item.description: The Pentagon says that the U.S. military has launched retaliatory strikes on Iran after a commercial vessel was hit in the Strait of Hormuz. Trump had teased a potential retaliation against Iran while speaking to reporters at the White House, just hours after claiming that Iran had violated the ceasefire agreement signed last week.

media:content.media:title: U.S. strikes Iran after attack on commercial vessel in Strait of Hormuz
media:content.media:description: The Pentagon says that the U.S. military has launched retaliatory strikes on Iran after a commercial vessel was hit in the Strait of Hormuz. Trump had teased a potential retaliation against Iran while speaking to reporters at the White House, just hours after claiming that Iran had violated the ceasefire agreement signed last week.

item.title: U.S. strikes Iran after attack on commercial vessel in Strait of Hormuz

item.dc:creator: Ana Vanessa Herrero
Nicole Acevedo
Geraldine Cols Azócar
item.description: As thousands are trapped in the rubble and with time running out, some families facing the unimaginable got the outcome they were desperately hoping for.

media:content.media:text: 4-year-old kid rescued.
media:content.media:description: 4-year-old trapped for over 24 hours rescued José Alberto Gallipoli shared video of the rescue of his 4-year-old grandson in La Guaira, where he and his parents had been trapped in their apartment for more than 24 hours until they were rescued. Gallipoli's son and wife had been able to let others know they were okay inside as Gallipolli pleaded for their rescue.

media:content.media:credit: Ana Vanessa Herrero for NBC News
media:content.media:text: People camp in an open space in La Guaira, Venezuela.
media:content.media:description: People camp in an open space in La Guaira, Venezuela.

media:content.media:text: A view of the destroyed building.
media:content.media:description: The building where Gallipoli's son and wife were trapped. They had been able to let others know they were OK inside as Gallipolli pleaded for their rescue.

media:content.media:text: 4-year-old trapped for over 24 hours rescued José Alberto Gallipoli shared video of the rescue of his 4-year-old grandson in La Guaira, where he and his parents had been trapped in their apartment for more than 24 hours until they were rescued. Gallipoli's son and wife had been able to let others know they were okay inside as Gallipolli pleaded for their rescue.
media:content.media:description: The building where Gallipoli's son and wife were trapped.

media:content.media:credit: Ana Vanessa Herrero for NBC News
media:content.media:text: A destroyed building in La Guaira, Venezuela.
media:content.media:description: Venezuela's acting President Delcy Rodríguez said La Guaira has been militarized to provide additional help.

item.title: Agony, then ‘a miracle’: Venezuelan families describe reuniting with rescued loved ones

item.dc:creator: Joelle Gross
Jiachuan Wu
Ashley Mowreader
Joe Murphy
item.description: NBC News is tracking French star Kylian Mbappé and Argentine legend Lionel Messi as they battle for the all-time FIFA World Cup scoring record.

media:content.media:text: Kylian Mbappe of France and Lionel Messi of Argentina during the 2026 World Cup.
media:content.media:description: Kylian Mbappe of France and Lionel Messi of Argentina celebrate goals during the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Gooooooooals: Tracking Mbappé and Messi’s battle for the all-time World Cup scoring record

item.dc:creator: Mark Hodge
item.description: The United States lost last night, 3-2, on a late goal by Turkey. But the biggest development? Star Christian Pulisic returned from injury and showed he was healthy in time for the knockout stage.

media:content.media:text: U.S. forward Christian Pulisic during a World Cup match against Turkey on June 25, 2026.
media:content.media:description: U.S. forward Christian Pulisic during last night's match against Turkey.

media:content.media:text: Sebastian Berhalter, left, and Auston Trusty of the U.S. react after their loss in a World Cup match against Turkey on June 25, 2026.
media:content.media:description: U.S. forward Christian Pulisic during last night's match against Turkey.

media:content.media:text: Erling Haaland of Norway during their match against Senegal.
media:content.media:description: U.S. forward Christian Pulisic during last night's match against Turkey.

media:content.media:text: SOCCER: JUN 22 FIFA World Cup 26 Group I - France vs Iraq
media:content.media:description: U.S. forward Christian Pulisic during last night's match against Turkey.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: The U.S. lost, but also saw return of star Christian Pulisic

item.description: La lluvia no ha permitido a la selección española hacer reconocimiento de cancha; con caras perplejas esperan a que calme la lluvia. El mal tiempo ya retrasó un juego en este torneo, pero parece que la lluvia ha cesado en el Estadio Guadalajara.

media:content.media:title: Tormenta antes del partido impide a los jugadores españoles reconocer la cancha
media:content.media:description: La lluvia no ha permitido a la selección española hacer reconocimiento de cancha; con caras perplejas esperan a que calme la lluvia. El mal tiempo ya retrasó un juego en este torneo, pero parece que la lluvia ha cesado en el Estadio Guadalajara.

item.title: Tormenta antes del partido impide a los jugadores españoles reconocer la cancha

item.description: El Director Técnico de Uruguay revela que el punto fundamental para la victoria será dominar a España y no permitirles tener oportunidades de gol; además, Darwin Núñez será titular en Guadalajara.

media:content.media:title: Marcelo Bielsa: “Lo más importante es que logremos dominar al rival”
media:content.media:description: El Director Técnico de Uruguay revela que el punto fundamental para la victoria será dominar a España y no permitirles tener oportunidades de gol; además, Darwin Núñez será titular en Guadalajara.

item.title: Marcelo Bielsa: “Lo más importante es que logremos dominar al rival”

item.description: El defensa español hace hincapié que han preparado el juego con las expectativas de ganar. Aunque la estrategia del uruguayo Bielsa será ofensivo, Cucurella afirma que están preparados y será un partido muy disputado por la calidad de ambos equipos.

media:content.media:title: Marc Cucurella: “Intentaremos ganar y así no estaremos sufriendo hasta el final”
media:content.media:description: El defensa español hace hincapié que han preparado el juego con las expectativas de ganar. Aunque la estrategia del uruguayo Bielsa será ofensivo, Cucurella afirma que están preparados y será un partido muy disputado por la calidad de ambos equipos.

item.title: Marc Cucurella: “Intentaremos ganar y así no estaremos sufriendo hasta el final”

item.description: La selección de Uruguay completará la ronda de fase de grupos contra España. Como segundo lugar, la ‘Celeste’ tiene la misión de buscar una victoria para posicionarse como líder, o mantener como mínimo la clasificación a eliminatorias.

media:content.media:title: Los uruguayos llegan con altas expectativas al Estadio Guadalajara
media:content.media:description: La selección de Uruguay completará la ronda de fase de grupos contra España. Como segundo lugar, la ‘Celeste’ tiene la misión de buscar una victoria para posicionarse como líder, o mantener como mínimo la clasificación a eliminatorias.

item.title: Los uruguayos llegan con altas expectativas al Estadio Guadalajara

item.description: Las selección de Uruguay llegó preparada para un partido de 'vida o muerte' ante España. Bentacur sabe que será un encuentro muy difícil por la calidad de las individualidades de La Roja, pero sabe que ellos deben aprovechar también las suyas.

media:content.media:title: Rodrigo Bentancur: "Tenemos que contrarrestar la tenencia de pelota de España"
media:content.media:description: Las selección de Uruguay llegó preparada para un partido de 'vida o muerte' ante España. Bentacur sabe que será un encuentro muy difícil por la calidad de las individualidades de La Roja, pero sabe que ellos deben aprovechar también las suyas.

item.title: Rodrigo Bentancur: "Tenemos que contrarrestar la tenencia de pelota de España"

item.description: Marcelo Bielsa y varios futbolistas de Uruguay explicaron cómo el trabajo colectivo, la atención a los detalles y la convicción en una idea de juego han fortalecido a la “Celeste” en el Mundial FIFA 2026.

media:content.media:title: Marcelo Bielsa reveló cuál es la esencia de la selección de Uruguay | Vive el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Marcelo Bielsa y varios futbolistas de Uruguay explicaron cómo el trabajo colectivo, la atención a los detalles y la convicción en una idea de juego han fortalecido a la “Celeste” en el Mundial FIFA 2026.

item.title: Marcelo Bielsa reveló cuál es la esencia de la selección de Uruguay | Vive el Mundial

item.description: Ousmane Dembélé brilló con un hat-trick para guiar a Francia a una victoria que le permitió cerrar con paso perfecto la fase de grupos del Mundial 2026. Noruega, ya clasificada, afrontó el encuentro con una alineación repleta de suplentes.

media:content.media:title: Hat-Trick de Dembélé para guiar la victoria de Francia ante Noruega
media:content.media:description: Ousmane Dembélé brilló con un hat-trick para guiar a Francia a una victoria que le permitió cerrar con paso perfecto la fase de grupos del Mundial 2026. Noruega, ya clasificada, afrontó el encuentro con una alineación repleta de suplentes.

item.title: Hat-Trick de Dembélé para guiar la victoria de Francia ante Noruega

item.description: Senegal firmó una contundente victoria por 5-0 sobre Irak en la última jornada del Grupo I del Mundial 2026, con goles de Seck, Sarr, doblete de Pape Gueye y Ndiaye, un resultado que le permite seguir soñando con avanzar a la siguiente ronda.

media:content.media:title: Senegal aplasta a Irak con una goleada 5-0 y mantiene viva su ilusión mundialista.
media:content.media:description: Senegal firmó una contundente victoria por 5-0 sobre Irak en la última jornada del Grupo I del Mundial 2026, con goles de Seck, Sarr, doblete de Pape Gueye y Ndiaye, un resultado que le permite seguir soñando con avanzar a la siguiente ronda.

item.title: Senegal aplasta a Irak con una goleada 5-0 y mantiene viva su ilusión mundialista.

item.description: El asistente técnico de Francia, Guy Stéphan, habló sobre el excelente partido que el equipo planteó ante Noruega para terminar primeros del grupo, reconociendo que la celebración es moderada, por evitar exceso de confianza y el luto de Deschamps.

media:content.media:title: Francia celebra con moderación su goleada a Noruega con Deschamps en el pensamiento
media:content.media:description: El asistente técnico de Francia, Guy Stéphan, habló sobre el excelente partido que el equipo planteó ante Noruega para terminar primeros del grupo, reconociendo que la celebración es moderada, por evitar exceso de confianza y el luto de Deschamps.

item.title: Francia celebra con moderación su goleada a Noruega con Deschamps en el pensamiento

item.description: Después de anotar un Hat-Trick, el jugador del PSG se mostró serio y contundente con sus declaraciones, asegurando que en Francia están muy concentrados.

media:content.media:title: No regaló una sonrisa... Dembélé lanzó un claro aviso al resto de las selecciones en el Mundial
media:content.media:description: Después de anotar un Hat-Trick, el jugador del PSG se mostró serio y contundente con sus declaraciones, asegurando que en Francia están muy concentrados.

item.title: No regaló una sonrisa... Dembélé lanzó un claro aviso al resto de las selecciones en el Mundial

item.dc:creator: Daniella Silva
item.description: Immigrants are reeling from the decision that leaves them vulnerable to removal after decades in the U.S.

media:content.media:text: Boston Haitian community leaders react to Supreme Court TPS ruling
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Zama holds a sign of support written in Haitian Creole that translates to "You Belong Here" during a news conference outside the State House in Boston on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Two arms crossed over one another, a bracelet with the text "Haiti" on it is worn on his wrist
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Zama holds a sign of support written in Haitian Creole that translates to "You Belong Here" during a news conference outside the State House in Boston on Thursday.

item.title: ‘Couldn’t breathe’: TPS holders fear they’re now deportation targets following Supreme Court ruling

item.dc:creator: Suzy Khimm
item.description: Researchers analyzed millions of electronic health records and found a major difference between states that greenlit sports gambling and those that didn’t.
item.title: Gambling disorder diagnoses spike in states that legalized sports betting, study shows

item.description: France is broiling under the largest heat alert ever issued, as authorities grapple with an unrelenting and deadly heatwave. Red alerts are also in place across Europe, from Spain to the U.K. NBC’s Daniele Hamamdjian reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: France Records Hottest Day Ever as Europe Swelters in Heatwave
media:content.media:description: France is broiling under the largest heat alert ever issued, as authorities grapple with an unrelenting and deadly heatwave. Red alerts are also in place across Europe, from Spain to the U.K. NBC’s Daniele Hamamdjian reports for TODAY.

item.title: France Records Hottest Day Ever as Europe Swelters in Heatwave

item.dc:creator: Zoe Malin
item.description: It’s the final day of Amazon Prime Day 2026, and we’re updating our list of editor-approved deals live. Shop tech, beauty, kitchen and more before the sale ends.
item.title: Prime Day discounts end tonight: Shop these 401+ worth-it deals before they’re over from Apple, Le Creuset, Tarte and more

item.dc:creator: Jason Kane
Erin McLaughlin
Lauren Dunn
item.description: Sens. Kirsten Gillibrand and Eric Schmitt issued a letter Friday to Pentagon leadership calling for the military healthcare program to cover autism therapy as a basic benefit.

media:content.media:text: Logan Cabiao with his parents.
media:content.media:description: Logan Cabiao with his parents Kristi and Mario.

item.title: Senators call for the military healthcare program to cover autism therapy as a basic benefit

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
Annelise Hanson
item.description: The NBC News poll asked American adults which historical event they thought was the country’s biggest accomplishment in its 250 years.

media:content.media:text: Buzz Aldrin Poses next To The U.S. flag On Moon
media:content.media:description: Astronaut Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin on July 20, 1969, during the Apollo 11 mission to the moon.

media:content.media:text: A word cloud of responses to a poll question about what Americans think the country's greatest achievement has been.
media:content.media:description: Astronaut Edwin "Buzz" Aldrin on July 20, 1969, during the Apollo 11 mission to the moon.

item.title: Civil rights, moon landings and war wins: What Americans see as the country’s greatest achievements

item.dc:creator: Tim Rohan
item.description: George Weah won the Ballon d’Or in 1995 and is considered one of the best soccer players of his generation. Now, his son is carving his own path on the U.S. men’s national team.

media:content.media:text: United States Portraits - FIFA World Cup 2026
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: Timothy Weah of United States
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: George Weah holding the Ballon D'Or in 1995; Timothy Weah holding the Coppa Italia in 2024.
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: On-field action during World Cup Qatar 2022.
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

media:content.media:text: George Weah, President of Liberia
media:content.media:description: Tim Weah in Laguna Niguel, Calif., on June 8.

item.title: Out from his father’s shadow, Tim Weah is carving his own path with the U.S.

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
Justin Goldman
item.description: The former transportation secretary said he was forced to spend 24 hours away from his 4-year-old twins during the probe. Police determined it was a false report.

media:content.media:text: Pete Buttigieg.
media:content.media:description: Pete Buttigieg described the incident in detail in a Substack post.

item.title: Pete Buttigieg targeted by ‘false report’ to authorities involving his 4-year-old twins

item.dc:creator: Daniella Silva
item.description: Immigrants are reeling from the decision that leaves them vulnerable to removal after decades in the U.S.

media:content.media:text: Boston Haitian community leaders react to Supreme Court TPS ruling
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Zama holds a sign of support written in Haitian Creole that translates to "You Belong Here" during a news conference outside the State House in Boston on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Two arms crossed over one another, a bracelet with the text "Haiti" on it is worn on his wrist
media:content.media:description: Rebecca Zama holds a sign of support written in Haitian Creole that translates to "You Belong Here" during a news conference outside the State House in Boston on Thursday.

item.title: ‘Couldn’t breathe’: TPS holders fear they’re now deportation targets following Supreme Court ruling

item.dc:creator: Jason Kane
Erin McLaughlin
Lauren Dunn
item.description: Sens. Kirsten Gillibrand and Eric Schmitt issued a letter Friday to Pentagon leadership calling for the military healthcare program to cover autism therapy as a basic benefit.

media:content.media:text: Logan Cabiao with his parents.

item.title: Senators call for the military healthcare program to cover autism therapy as a basic benefit
